name: Compliance x Consulting
description: Compliance x Consulting specializes in Regulatory Compliance and Quality for regulated industries such as pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, and medical devices. With a team of Subject Matter Experts, the company offers services in Inspection Readiness, Good Laboratory Practices, and the implementation of Quality Management Systems, ensuring organizations meet the highest compliance standards.

name: NRS a COMPLY company
description: COMPLY specializes in compliance consulting for financial services, providing a range of solutions including regulatory consulting, managed services, and compliance education. Their team of experienced consultants assists firms in navigating regulatory requirements, enhancing compliance programs, and addressing specific compliance challenges.

name: The Compliance Search Group LLC
description: The Compliance Search Group is a prominent provider of compliance consulting services, specializing in recruiting highly qualified professionals in areas such as Compliance, Regulatory, and Risk Management. They cater to a diverse clientele, including Fortune 500 companies and financial institutions, offering tailored staffing solutions to address compliance challenges.

name: Compliance Experts
description: Compliance Experts specializes in risk and compliance solutions, offering both software and consultancy services to help organizations navigate complex regulatory landscapes. Their comprehensive approach, including the Compliance Checkpoint app, streamlines compliance management, making it more efficient and less burdensome for businesses.

name: Attain Partners
description: Attain Partners is a prominent compliance consulting firm that offers expert guidance to help organizations navigate regulatory complexities and implement best practices for maintaining compliance. Their services include tailored consulting solutions, financial aid assessments, and strategies for optimizing performance and cost recovery.

name: Compliance Corporate
description: Compliance Corporate is a specialized organization offering comprehensive compliance consulting services, including the development of compliance programs and external officer services. Their expertise encompasses areas such as anti-money laundering, counter-terrorism financing, and data protection, making them a valuable resource for companies seeking to navigate complex regulatory landscapes.

name: Compliance & Risks
description: Compliance & Risks is a leading provider of compliance consulting, offering a comprehensive platform, C2P, that integrates a vast library of regulatory content and tools to help businesses navigate product compliance across 195 countries. Their expertise and technology enable companies to stay informed about regulatory changes, ensuring they can effectively manage compliance and unlock market access.

name: U.S. Compliance Corporation (EHS Consulting Services)
description: U.S. Compliance is a prominent consulting firm that specializes in environmental, health, and safety compliance, particularly focusing on OSHA and EPA regulations. With nearly 30 years of experience, they offer tailored compliance strategies and a subscription-based service model, providing clients with effective and predictable solutions for their regulatory needs.

name: Compliance Hub Consulting (Pty) Ltd
description: Compliance Hub Consulting specializes in providing comprehensive compliance solutions, particularly in areas like B-BBEE, Occupational Health and Safety (OHS), and Employment Equity. Their expertise and services are designed to simplify compliance for businesses, enabling them to navigate regulatory requirements effectively.

name: Compliance Professionals Plc
description: Compliance Professionals Plc (CPP) specializes in compliance consulting, offering tailored services that enhance operational effectiveness and ensure adherence to regulations. With a focus on compliance and performance audits, CPP supports individuals, corporate organizations, and government entities in achieving optimal performance through innovative and ethical solutions.
